Class NativeMatrix

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.nativ.mathematics.linearalgebra.matrices.NativeMatrix
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, MatrixStorage<Real>, RealDoubleMatrixStorage
public class NativeMatrix extends Object implements RealDoubleMatrixStorage, AutoCloseable
A dense matrix backed by off-heap native memory.

This class provides zero-copy access for native libraries (BLAS, LAPACK) via Project Panama's Foreign Function invalid input: '&' Memory API.

Memory is allocated outside the Java heap, avoiding GC pressure for large matrices and enabling direct handoff to C/C++ code.

Usage Example

try (Arena arena = Arena.ofConfined()) {
    NativeMatrix A = new NativeMatrix(1000, 1000, arena);
    NativeMatrix B = new NativeMatrix(1000, 1000, arena);
    NativeMatrix C = new NativeMatrix(1000, 1000, arena);
    
    // Fill matrices...
    A.set(0, 0, 1.0);
    
    // Pass to BLAS for multiplication
    BlasBackend.dgemm(A, B, C);
}
Since:
1.1
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    NativeMatrix(int rows, int cols)
    Creates a native matrix with its own confined arena.
    NativeMatrix(int rows, int cols, Arena arena)
    Creates a new native matrix with the given dimensions.
    NativeMatrix(MemorySegment data, int rows, int cols, Arena arena)
    Wraps an existing memory segment as a matrix.

  • Constructor Details

    • NativeMatrix

      public NativeMatrix(int rows, int cols, Arena arena)
      Creates a new native matrix with the given dimensions.

      The matrix is initialized to zero.

      Parameters:
      rows - number of rows
      cols - number of columns
      arena - the arena for memory allocation

    • NativeMatrix

      public NativeMatrix(int rows, int cols)
      Creates a native matrix with its own confined arena.

      The arena is closed when close() is called.

      Parameters:
      rows - number of rows
      cols - number of columns

    • NativeMatrix

      public NativeMatrix(MemorySegment data, int rows, int cols, Arena arena)
      Wraps an existing memory segment as a matrix.
      Parameters:
      data - the memory segment containing the matrix data
      rows - number of rows
      cols - number of columns
      arena - the arena that owns the segment

  • Method Details

    • segment

      public MemorySegment segment()
      Returns the underlying memory segment for native access.
      Returns:
      the memory segment containing matrix data in row-major order

      public void setAll(double[] values)
      Copies data from a Java array into this matrix.

    • toArray

      public double[] toArray()
      Copies data from this matrix into a Java array.
      Returns:
      row-major array of values

    • leadingDimension

      public int leadingDimension()
      Returns the leading dimension (for BLAS compatibility).

      For row-major storage, this is the number of columns.

      Returns:
      leading dimension

    • reshape

      public NativeMatrix reshape(int newRows, int newCols)
      Reshapes the matrix to new dimensions. The total number of elements must remain the same.

    • transpose

      public NativeMatrix transpose()
      Creates a new transposed matrix.
